programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: Runaway Train
programme.desc: Jon Voight and Eric Roberts turn in Oscar®-nominated performances as a pair of escaped convicts who hop a freight train, but when the engineer dies of a heart attack, they find themselves trapped, alone and speeding toward certain disaster.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: Screen greats Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield and Jeanne Moreau star in this suspense-laden tale of justice and retribution as a French Resistance fighter (Lancaster) attempts to stop a Nazi commander from looting the art treasures of Paris.

programme.title: The Battle Of Britain (1969)
programme.desc: A stellar cast, including Michael Caine, Laurence Olivier and Christopher Plummer highlights this epic telling of the greatest air battle in history, when the outnumbered Royal Air Force defeated the German Luftwaffe, saving England from invasion.

programme.title: Valkyrie
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Colonel Claus von Stauffenberg (Tom Cruise) and his assassination plot targeting Adolph Hitler, this engrossing thriller reenacts the daring operation to eliminate one of the most evil tyrants the world has ever known.

programme.title: The Bounty
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins delivers a brilliant portrayal as William Bligh, the sea captain who, in 1787, steered The Bounty on a 27,000-mile voyage into danger, chaos and madness, and whose first mate (Mel Gibson) lead a legendary mutiny against him..

programme.title: The Man In The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programme.title: Blind Rage
programme.desc: They don't need to see to steal! They're five unstoppable blind men. They can hear your heartbeat, smell your fear, and almost taste $15 million in secret CIA loot. Only one man stands in their way. He's the ultimate mercenary, and he doesn't know when to quit. They may be close to the perfect crime, but they'll never know what hit them.

programme.title: Hell Up In Harlem
programme.desc: Recovering from an onslaught of bullets that would have killed a lesser man, the Godfather of Harlem, Tommy Gibbs, is back and is out for revenge against the sleazy New York District Attorney (Gerald Gordon) who had set up the hit-gone-wrong.

programme.title: Truck Turner
programme.desc: The great Isaac Hayes stars in this powerful, pull-out-the-stops crime thriller that pulsates with high-octane energy and nonstop suspense as Truck Turner tracks a sadistic pimp through the mean streets of Los Angeles. Nichelle Nichols also stars.

programme.title: Black Caesar
programme.desc: The brutal assault at the hands of a racist cop will inform the life of Tommy Gibbs (Fred Williamson, "Hammer"), who will grow up to become the reigning head of Harlem�s black mafia in "Black Caesar."
